task_description: Add a pure function formatBytes(n: number): string to src/utils/format.ts returning '1.5 MB' style. Include 3 vitest cases: happy path (1500000 → '1.5 MB'), zero (0 → '0 B'), and large (1.5e9 → '1.5 GB').
grounded_in: Optimizer seat O-1 (baseline diagnostic — if a variant fails this, deep problem unrelated to specific failure modes)

allowlist.comment: Standard math + test framework. Should be effectively impossible to hallucinate on this fixture.
